data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Reviewed commit 7734df82 on feat/foolery-2794: the change is limited to src/components/beat-column-defs-extra.tsx and adds explicit size/min/max constraints to the State column (120/100/150) while reducing meta.minWidthPx to 100. This aligns the State column with the other fixed-width Active-table columns so extra width is no longer absorbed primarily by State. No scope, data, or behavior changes beyond layout. Sanity gates verified in an isolated checkout of feat/foolery-2794: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (192 files, 2293 passed), and bun run build all passed.
